description: A unit of planned implementation work. Contains intent, success criteria, specs (decomposed work items), status lifecycle (planned, in-progress, completed), and dependency tracking. Phases live in .project/phases/ as individual files.
title: Phase

goal.description: What is true after this phase that was not true before

status.description: Phase lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (workflow-shaped); phases use a 3-state planning lifecycle. Reconciliation tracked in FGAP-021.

verify_method.description: How to verify this success criterion. Intentionally narrower subset of pi-context://schemas/verification-method (which is command/grep/ast/inspect/human/test); phases support only the 3 most common methods. Reconciliation tracked in FGAP-021.

status.description: Spec lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (workflow-shaped); specs share the phase's 3-state planning lifecycle. Reconciliation tracked in FGAP-021.

inputs.description: What this phase needs from prior phases or external sources

outputs.description: What this phase produces for later phases or users
